extract: Iron Defense redirects here. For the Pokémon Battle e card pack, see Iron Defense (Battle e). Iron Defense (Japanese: てっぺき Iron Wall) is a non-damaging Steel-type move introduced in Generation III. It is: TR46 in Pokémon Sword and Shield. TM104 in Pokémon Scarlet and Violet. TM080 in Pokémon Legends: Z-A.
